Project Name: 1. Contract Value = Total amount client agreed to pay
2. Total Budget = Your internal cost estimate (should be < Contract Value)
4. Total Costs = sum of all cost columns
5. Gross Profit = Contract Value - Total Costs
8. Update costs weekly for active projects
9. Review margins monthly to identify profitable vs problem projects
- Gross Margin % should be 20-35% for most projects
- Track budget vs actual costs to improve future estimates
